mapper.select: select la.id, ai.name as "apartmentName", ri.room_number, la.status as "leaseStatus", la.lease_start_date, la.lease_end_date, la.source_type, la.rent, ri.id as room_id from lease_agreement as la left join room_info as ri on la.room_id = ri.id and ri.is_deleted = 0 left join apartment_info as ai on ri.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 where la.phone = #{username} and la.is_deleted = 0
select name, url from graph_info where item_type = 2 and item_id = #{roomId} and is_deleted = 0

select lg.id, lg.phone, lg.name, lg.identification_number, lg.apartment_id, lg.room_id, lg.lease_start_date, lg.lease_end_date, lg.lease_term_id, lg.rent, lg.deposit, lg.payment_type_id, lg.status, lg.source_type, lg.additional_info, ai.name as "apartmentName", ri.room_number from lease_agreement as lg left join room_info as ri on lg.room_id = ri.id and ri.is_deleted = 0 left join apartment_info as ai on lg.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 where lg.id = #{id} and lg.is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select name, url from graph_info where item_type = 1 and item_id = #{apartmentId} and is_deleted = 0

select pt.name as "paymentTypeName" from room_payment_type as rpt join payment_type as pt on rpt.payment_type_id = pt.id and pt.is_deleted = 0 where rpt.room_id = #{roomId} and rpt.is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select lt.month_count from room_lease_term as rlt join lease_term as lt on rlt.lease_term_id = lt.id and lt.is_deleted = 0 where rlt.room_id = #{roomId} and rlt.is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select lt.unit from room_lease_term as rlt join lease_term as lt on rlt.lease_term_id = lt.id and lt.is_deleted = 0 where rlt.room_id = #{roomId} and rlt.is_deleted = 0 limit 1
